TradFi Trading Challenge

Join now and trade to share $50,000
Terms & Conditions

1. Use the "Register Now" button to join the event.

2. New users refer to users who sign up during the event, or users who have not traded TradFi futures before the event. Market makers and institutional users are not eligible to participate and will not be rewarded.

3. Eligible spot pairs: MSTRON/USDT, SPCXON/USDT, and MUON/USDT."First Spot Trade" refers to your very first trade after signing up. "New Users" refers to users who sign up during the event.

4. Eligible TradFi futures pairs: On the web platform, all pairs under "Futures" > "TradFi" in the top navigation bar. On the app, all pairs under the "Stocks" home screen shortcut > "TradFi". Note: Zero-fee TradFi futures trades are not counted toward trading volume for this event.

5. Rewards will be distributed as trial funds within ten working days after the event. Read the event rules and reward instructions before use.

6. Rewards for each task are calculated separately. Eligible users can claim rewards for each task that they qualify for.

7. If bulk registration, wash trading, cheating, or other illegal behavior is detected, WEEX will disqualify the participants involved and revoke their rewards.

8. WEEX reserves the right to change the event rules, cancel, extend, terminate, or suspend events, and modify rewards at any time without prior notice.

9. All participants shall be bound by the revised terms. WEEX reserves the right of final interpretation for this event. Contact customer support if you have any questions.

10. Rewards are first-come, first-served, while supplies last.
